message:
Command `# LIBRELANE ENDED! 
# error.log shows: PSM-0069 "Check connectivity failed on VCCD/VSSD"
# This is the power grid connectivity check failing for the analog power domains (VCCD, VSSD)
# These are the ESD/analog VDD/VSS rails used by pads - NOT the digital VDD/VSS.
# This is a checker step that may have run AFTER GRT completed.
# The flow stopped because of this power check failure.
# 
# Check the full flow end to understand sequence
tail -30 /tmp/pnr_v4.log` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# LIBRELANE ENDED!

# This is a checker step that may have run AFTER GRT completed.
# The flow stopped because of this power check failure.
# 
# Check the full flow end to understand sequence
tail -30 /tmp/pnr_v4.log"}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# LIBRELANE ENDED! 
# error.log shows: PSM-0069 "Check connectivity failed on VCCD/VSSD"
# This is the power grid connectivity check failing for the analog power domains (VCCD, VSSD)
# These are the ESD/analog VDD/VSS rails used by pads - NOT the digital VDD/VSS.
# This is a checker step that may have run AFTER GRT completed.
# The flow stopped because of this power check failure.
# 
# Check the full flow end to understand sequence
tail -30 /tmp/pnr_v4.log
